NM.notes: State Heart Gallery site https://heartgallerynm.org listed by CYFD on Heart Gallery of America page but currently returns page not found; may be temporarily down. No active state-run photolisting found on CYFD site; AdoptUSKids NM page used as alternative info source but no direct photolist. Heart Gallery is CYFD-coordinated local chapter.

orgs.name: Koinonia Family Services

NV.notes: No state-wide .gov photolisting found; used Clark County (majority of cases). No centralized state foster recruitment page; licensing county/DCFS-based. Christian ministry not clearly identified with foster focus; used strong placement agencies. Detailed notes saved to nevada_foster_research_notes.md. All URLs live per fetches [AdoptUSKids](https://adoptuskids.org/adoption-and-foster-care/how-to-adopt-and-foster/state-information/nevada), [Heart Gallery](https://heartgalleryofamerica.org/galleries/nevada/), county sites.

NY.notes: OCFS child photolisting referenced but direct page not found (photolisting.asp 404); Heart Gallery New York is OCFS project and semi-official. State foster licensing via local districts per OCFS guidance. Heart Gallery NYC active but NYC-focused; used state version.[OCFS Disclaimer](https://ocfs.ny.gov/programs/adoption/disclaimer.php), [Heart Gallery NY](https://www.heartgallerynewyork.org/), [OCFS Requirements](https://ocfs.ny.gov/programs/fostercare/requirements.php)
